# Woodcutting – gather ash, spruce and birch
move('Hero', 6, 1)
for i in range(57):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 2, 6)
for i in range(48):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 3, 5)
for i in range(95):
    gather('Hero')

# Mining – gather iron ore, coal and jasper crystal
move('Hero', 1, 7)
for i in range(84):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 1, 6)
for i in range(140):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 0, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather('Hero')

# Monster hunting – collect all needed mob drops
move('Hero', 8, 6)
for i in range(16):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, 0)
for i in range(12):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, -3)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 5, 4)
for i in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 0, 2)
for i in range(8):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 5, 3)
for i in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

# Craft intermediate resources
move('Hero', 1, 5)
craft('Hero', 'steel', 28)

move('Hero', -2, -3)
craft('Hero', 'spruce_plank', 2)
craft('Hero', 'hardwood_plank', 19)

# Craft gear items
move('Hero', 3, 1)
craft('Hero', 'steel_helm', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_armor', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skeleton_pants', 1)
craft('Hero', 'adventurer_boots', 1)

move('Hero', 2, 1)
craft('Hero', 'skull_staff', 1)

move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'steel_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skull_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'skull_amulet', 1)

# Equip the new set
unequip('Hero', 'weapon')
equip('Hero', 'weapon', 'skull_staff')

unequip('Hero', 'helmet')
equip('Hero', 'helmet', 'steel_helm')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'skeleton_armor')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'skeleton_pants')

unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'adventurer_boots')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'skull_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'steel_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'skull_amulet')

# Final objective – slay the ogre
move('Hero', -5, -5)
fight('Hero')

code:
# 1. Get two additional Life Crystals
move('Hero', 9, 7)
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')

# 2. Level-up Mining (to 35) and gather ores
move('Hero', 2, 0)          # copper rocks (lvl-1)
for _ in range(39):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 1, 7)          # iron rocks (lvl-10)
for _ in range(59):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 1, 6)          # coal rocks (lvl-20)
for _ in range(71):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, -4)        # gold rocks (lvl-30)
for _ in range(333):        # 333 gold ore
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 3, 6)          # magic rocks (lvl-20) – 6 Magical Cure
for _ in range(6):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 7)         # strange rocks (lvl-35) – 36 strange ore (incl. diamond)
for _ in range(36):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Level-up Woodcutting (to 30) and gather wood
move('Hero', -1, 0)         # ash trees (lvl-1)
for _ in range(39):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 1, 9)          # spruce trees (lvl-10)
for _ in range(59):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 3, 5)          # birch trees (lvl-20)
for _ in range(71):
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 9, 8)          # dead trees (lvl-30)
for _ in range(72):         # 72 Dead Wood
    gather('Hero')

# 4. Kill monsters for drops
move('Hero', 10, 1)         # Owlbear hair (7)
for _ in range(7):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, 6)         # Vampire blood (12)
for _ in range(12):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 8, 7)          # Death Knight – Red Cloth (3)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, 0)         # Wolf – Wolf bone (3)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 8, 6)          # Skeleton – Skeleton bone (3)
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -5, -5)        # Ogre – Ogre eye (5)
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 1, 13)         # Demon – Demon horns
for _ in range(14):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 12)        # Imp – demoniac dust & obsidian pieces
for _ in range(16):
    fight('Hero')

# 5. Process resources
move('Hero', 1, 5)          # mining station
craft('Hero', 'gold', 39)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 4)

move('Hero', -2, -3)        # woodcutting workshop
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 9)

# 6. Gear-crafting
move('Hero', 3, 1)          # gear-crafting station
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_platebody', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)

# 7. Jewellery-crafting
move('Hero', 1, 3)
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 1)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# 8. Equip the new gear
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'gold_platebody')

unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'gold_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')

equip('Hero', 'artifact1', 'life_crystal')
equip('Hero', 'artifact2', 'life_crystal')

# 9. Kill the Reaper
move('Hero', 9, 6)
fight('Hero')

# 1.  GATHER AND EXP, Woodcutting to 35
move('Hero', 9, 8)                 # dead_tree
for _ in range(200):               # dead_wood
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, 7)                # magic_tree
for _ in range(30):                # magic_wood
    gather('Hero')

# 2.  GATHER AND EXP, Mining to 35
move('Hero', 10, -4)               # gold_rocks
for _ in range(350):               # gold_ore (+sapphire/topaz chances)
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 7)                # strange_rocks
for _ in range(100):               # strange_ore (+diamond chances)
    gather('Hero')

move('Hero', 3, 6)                 # magic_rocks
for _ in range(50):                # magical_cure
    gather('Hero')

# 3.  MONSTER DROPS
move('Hero', 1, 13)                # Demon
for _ in range(14):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 0, 13)                # Imp
for _ in range(34):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, 1)                # Owlbear
for _ in range(7):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 4, 8)                 # Bandit Lizard
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 8, 7)                 # Death Knight
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 13)               # Cultist Acolyte
for _ in range(3):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -5, -5)               # Ogre
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, 6)                # Vampire
for _ in range(14):
    fight('Hero')

# 4.  Extra Life Crystals
move('Hero', 9, 7)                 # Lich
for _ in range(2):
    fight('Hero')

# 5.  CRAFT BARS & PLANKS
move('Hero', 1, 5)                 # mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold', 39)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 12)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)

move('Hero', -2, -3)               # woodcutting workshop
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)
craft('Hero', 'magical_plank', 6)

# 6.  CRAFT GEAR
move('Hero', 3, 1)                 # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_platebody', 1)
craft('Hero', 'ancient_jean', 1)
craft('Hero', 'gold_boots', 1)

# 7.  CRAFT JEWELLERY
move('Hero', 1, 3)                 # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'topaz_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# 8.  EQUIP NEW SET
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'gold_platebody')

unequip('Hero', 'leg_armor')
equip('Hero', 'leg_armor', 'ancient_jean')

unequip('Hero', 'boots')
equip('Hero', 'boots', 'gold_boots')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'topaz_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'topaz_ring')

equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')

equip('Hero', 'artifact2', 'life_crystal')
equip('Hero', 'artifact3', 'life_crystal')

# 9.  KILL THE REAPER
move('Hero', 9, 6)                 # Reaper location
fight('Hero')

Successfully created custom character - Hero.

code:
# raise Mining to 35+
move('Hero', 2, 0)                 # copper rocks
for _ in range(214):
    gather('Hero')                 # +10 levels above req never reached, so 50 xp each

# raise Woodcutting to 30
move('Hero', -1, 0)                # ash tree
for _ in range(169):
    gather('Hero')

# gather Dead Wood for planks
move('Hero', 9, 8)                 # dead tree
for _ in range(96):
    gather('Hero')

# gather Gold ore (+ sapphires/rubies)
move('Hero', 10, -4)               # gold rocks
for _ in range(300):
    gather('Hero')

# gather Magical Cure
move('Hero', 3, 6)                 # magic rocks
for _ in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# gather Strange Ore + Diamond
move('Hero', -1, 7)                # strange rocks
for _ in range(50):
    gather('Hero')

# collect monster resources
move('Hero', 1, 13)                # Demon
for _ in range(20):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -1, 12)               # Imp
for _ in range(10):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, -3)               # Pig
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -3, 0)                # Wolf
for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 8, 6)                 # Skeleton
for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', 10, 6)                # Vampire
for _ in range(6):
    fight('Hero')

move('Hero', -5, -5)               # Ogre
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# craft mining products (gold, obsidian, strangold)
move('Hero', 1, 5)                 # mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold', 23)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian', 6)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)

# craft wood products (dead-wood planks)
move('Hero', -2, -3)               # woodcutting workshop
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 12)

# craft gear (shield, armor)
move('Hero', 3, 1)                 # gear-crafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)
craft('Hero', 'obsidian_armor', 1)

# craft jewellery
move('Hero', 1, 3)                 # jewellery-crafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 2)
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# equip new gear
unequip('Hero', 'shield')
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield')

unequip('Hero', 'body_armor')
equip('Hero', 'body_armor', 'obsidian_armor')

equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'gold_ring')
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'gold_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet')

# get Life Crystal
move('Hero', 9, 7)                 # Lich
fight('Hero')
equip('Hero', 'artifact1', 'life_crystal')

# defeat the Reaper
move('Hero', 9, 6)                 # Reaper
fight('Hero')

code:
# 1. Defeat a Lich to obtain the third Life Crystal
move('Hero', 9, 7)
fight('Hero')

# 2. Gather minerals (gold ore, possible sapphires) and raise Mining to 35+
move('Hero', 10, -4)          # gold_rocks
for _ in range(250):
    gather('Hero')

# 3. Gather Strange Ore (and a Diamond) for Strangold
move('Hero', -1, 7)           # strange_rocks
for _ in range(35):
    gather('Hero')

# 4. Gather Magical Cure stones
move('Hero', 3, 6)            # magic_rocks
for _ in range(3):
    gather('Hero')

# 5. Gather Dead Wood and raise Woodcutting to 30+
move('Hero', 9, 8)            # dead_tree
for _ in range(180):
    gather('Hero')

# 6. Kill Ogres (eyes & skins)
move('Hero', -5, -5)          # ogre
for _ in range(5):
    fight('Hero')

# 7. Kill Demons (horns)
move('Hero', 1, 13)           # demon
for _ in range(9):
    fight('Hero')

# 8. Craft Gold bars and Strangold
move('Hero', 1, 5)            # mining workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold', 7)
craft('Hero', 'strangold', 7)

# 9. Craft Dead-wood Planks
move('Hero', -2, -3)          # woodcutting workshop
craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 6)

# 10. Craft the Gold Shield
move('Hero', 3, 1)            # gearcrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

# 11. Craft the Greater Dreadful Amulet
move('Hero', 1, 3)            # jewelrycrafting workshop
craft('Hero', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)

# 12. Equip the new gear and the third Life Crystal
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'amulet', 'greater_dreadful_amulet', 1)
equip('Hero', 'artifact1', 'life_crystal', 1)

# 13. Hunt down the Cultist Emperor
move('Hero', -2, 13)
fight('Hero')

code:
# Raise Woodcutting to 30 and collect 96 dead wood
move('Hero', -1, 0)                 # ash_tree
for _ in range(44):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 2, 6)                  # spruce_tree
for _ in range(54):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', -1, 6)                 # birch_tree
for _ in range(71):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 9, 8)                  # dead_tree
for _ in range(96):
    gather('Hero')

# Raise Mining to 30 and collect ores / gems
move('Hero', 2, 0)                  # copper_rocks
for _ in range(44):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 7)                  # iron_rocks
for _ in range(54):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 1, 6)                  # coal_rocks
for _ in range(71):
    gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 3, 6)                  # magic_rocks  (magical_cure)
gather('Hero')
move('Hero', 10, -4)                # gold_rocks
for _ in range(200):                # plenty for 184 gold ore + chance sapphires
    gather('Hero')

# Get Demon Horns
move('Hero', 1, 13)                 # demon
for _ in range(4):
    fight('Hero')

# Craft resources
move('Hero', 1, 5)                  # mining workshop – smelt Gold bars
for _ in range(23):
    craft('Hero', 'gold', 1)

move('Hero', -2, -3)                # woodcutting workshop – Dead Wood Planks
for _ in range(12):
    craft('Hero', 'dead_wood_plank', 1)

# Craft Gear
move('Hero', 3, 1)                  # gearcrafting workshop – Gold Shield
craft('Hero', 'gold_shield', 1)

move('Hero', 1, 3)                  # jewelrycrafting workshop – two Gold Rings
for _ in range(2):
    craft('Hero', 'gold_ring', 1)

# Equip new items
equip('Hero', 'shield', 'gold_shield', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring1', 'gold_ring', 1)
equip('Hero', 'ring2', 'gold_ring', 1)

# Hunt the Bat
move('Hero', 8, 9)                  # bat location
fight('Hero')

# 1. Raise Mining skill to 35 and collect ores / gems
